name: Kingston Technology
evidence_note: Official Kingston support page lists memory, SSD, USB, cards, readers, embedded/industrial, product support, warranty, RMA, FAQs, installation guides, drivers and downloads.

name: Seagate Technology
evidence_note: Official Seagate support URLs are retained for direct use. Web fetch tooling encountered a redirect loop on seagate.com during this run, so the entry uses minimal official-domain evidence and should be rechecked by a browser or local curl later.
relevance_for_dr_debug: Storage vendor with HDD, SSD, external storage, firmware, diagnostic and data-recovery relevance, including SeaTools diagnostics.

name: NVIDIA
evidence_note: Official NVIDIA pages identify product areas including GPUs, embedded Jetson systems, networking, software tools, drivers and support resources.
